results.name: has_hook
results.detail: "Creatine isn't for muscle. It's for your *brain*."

rationales.hook_strength: Reframes a familiar product with a concrete, counterintuitive payoff in one sentence — high stop-the-scroll potential.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is a single, labeled idea with one bolded anchor; zero bloat.
rationales.audience_fit: Sleep-deprived, stressed, afternoon-crash audience is named explicitly mid-deck — lands precisely on the target.
rationales.novelty: Creatine-for-brain is a rising angle but has been circulating in supplement circles for 12–18 months; not yet saturated on TikTok health feeds.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are hedged throughout ('studies link', 'early signals'), voice is plain and un-hypey, CTA ties directly to the app's core Health Score concept.
rationales.predicted_performance: Strong save candidate given actionable dose slide and novel framing, but the mechanism slide (phosphocreatine/ATP) may lose casual viewers before the payoff.

hook_strength.why: Reframes a familiar product with a concrete, counterintuitive payoff in one sentence — high stop-the-scroll potential.

clarity.why: Each slide is a single, labeled idea with one bolded anchor; zero bloat.

audience_fit.why: Sleep-deprived, stressed, afternoon-crash audience is named explicitly mid-deck — lands precisely on the target.

novelty.why: Creatine-for-brain is a rising angle but has been circulating in supplement circles for 12–18 months; not yet saturated on TikTok health feeds.

brand_fit.why: Claims are hedged throughout ('studies link', 'early signals'), voice is plain and un-hypey, CTA ties directly to the app's core Health Score concept.

predicted_performance.why: Strong save candidate given actionable dose slide and novel framing, but the mechanism slide (phosphocreatine/ATP) may lose casual viewers before the payoff.

overall.why: One of the tighter decks in the batch — cover, dose, and CTA are all doing real work; the one risk is slide 2 going slightly too technical for the broadest slice of the audience.
